name: Garage Cluster
text1: Someone has wired together consumer GPUs in a suburban garage. A neighbor reports unusual power bills.
text2: Someone has built a GPU cluster in a suburban garage. Effective training recipes are circulating online.
image-prompt: A messy suburban garage filled with racks of GPU servers, blinking green LEDs, tangled ethernet cables, warm orange light from a bare bulb overhead, a concerned neighbor peering through the window, digital painting, no text
